name: ext-fs
docs:
OS filesystem API (run-os only).

Modules:
- std.os.fs
- std.os.fs.spec

Highlights (v1):
- streaming reader/writer handles: std.os.fs.stream_*_v1
- chunked copy helper: std.os.fs.stream_copy_to_end_v1
- convenience helper: std.os.fs.copy_file_v1

Usage:
- Add dependency: x07 pkg add ext-fs@0.1.6
- Import the modules listed above.
